data.name: 魅魔之戀
data.detailed_description:
Steam Card!


關於此遊戲

In a world inhabited by human-like monsters.

A young man lives peacefully in a remote village with his sister, helping run errands for her.

However, the monsters outside the village attack him on sight.

Steeling himself, he begins to work towards getting stronger, so he can protect those who are dear to him.

Features:

  • A Side-scrolling Action RPG

  • Skill Equip System

  • Multiple Difficulty Settings

  • Befriend Monsters

  • Gather Ingredients and Cook Food for Buffs
data.about_the_game:
In a world inhabited by human-like monsters.

A young man lives peacefully in a remote village with his sister, helping run errands for her.

However, the monsters outside the village attack him on sight.

Steeling himself, he begins to work towards getting stronger, so he can protect those who are dear to him.

Features:

  • A Side-scrolling Action RPG

  • Skill Equip System

  • Multiple Difficulty Settings

  • Befriend Monsters

  • Gather Ingredients and Cook Food for Buffs
data.short_description: In a world of human-like monsters, a young man lives in a quiet, remote village with his sister. However, he is attacked by monsters when he leaves the village. Now he works hard to become stronger so he no longer burdens his sister.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
